principle: Use narrative day phases instead of exact minute timestamps. Time follows scene logic, calendar pressure, travel and waiting; not turn count.

visible_time_rule.legacy_time_fields: current_time/time may exist for old compatibility, but gameplay rendering and calendar triggers should use current_day_phase/time_of_day.

phase_progression.current_phase_is_not_per_turn: Do not advance one phase per turn.
phase_progression.npc_activity_counts: NPCs act during Akira's pauses and travel. They do not freeze, but this changes scene pressure more often than it changes the day phase.

raiden.arrival_rule: later, not in the first couple of minutes/scenes; when Emma/Kairos energy trace is strong enough and Raiden logically follows it from the sea overlook route

samuel_people.arrival_rule: only after a longer delay if Akira has not reached Eastern Sector; they follow traces to Jun house/road/outside area and search for signs of Akira
